title: stelis oblonga
intro: Stelis oblonga, also known as the "butterfly orchid," is a type of orchid plant native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, fever reduction, and wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the Stelis oblonga plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
